allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Complete Robot1 integration with keyboard control

Major changes:
- Simplified config.txt to global settings only (HOST, PORT, ACTIVE_ROBOTS, DEBUG_MODE)
- Robot-specific settings moved to Robot1/robot_config.txt
- Updated config.py to support per-robot configuration loading
- Refactored main.py to use Robot1/ folder structure with importlib
- Added module identification to Robot1/keyboard_input.py
- Successfully tested keyboard control with new architecture (2 laps completed)

Technical improvements:
- Explicit module loading using importlib.util instead of sys.path manipulation
- No module path conflicts between root and Robot1/ folders
- Clear logging shows which module is loaded ([keyboard_input] Loaded from Robot1/)

Phase 1 milestone: Robot1 keyboard control fully operational

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
